The George Floyd protests in America and now the rest of the world are heartbreaking, but when people are killed and dehumanised for decades, rebellion is inevitable. It’s inevitable when justice is postponed. It’s inevitable when there is no law and order in the first place.

We’ve peacefully protested and that wasn’t enough. We’ve called on legislation to be changed and that wasn’t enough. We’ve died at the hands of police brutality and that still isn't enough. It’s about time we wake up. It’s about time that black lives mattered.

These protests aren’t opportunistic, they are an outburst of years of systemic failures towards black people around the world, years of missed opportunity by our government to fix what is broken. 

This is not just an American problem, there is a crisis here in the UK, too.
